# Row-Bot Docs

Public documentation index for Row-Bot.

- [Row-Bot Documentation](/docs/)
  Route: /docs/. A complete public user guide for installing, configuring, and using Row-Bot end to end.
- [Getting Started](/docs/getting-started/)
  Route: /docs/getting-started/. Install Row-Bot, complete first launch, and learn the first choices that matter.
- [Installation](/docs/getting-started/installation)
  Route: /docs/getting-started/installation. Install Row-Bot from a release package or run it from source with clear next steps.
- [First Launch](/docs/getting-started/first-launch)
  Route: /docs/getting-started/first-launch. Complete the first-run wizard, choose a model path, and revisit setup later.
- [Models And Providers](/docs/configuration/models-and-providers)
  Route: /docs/configuration/models-and-providers. Configure providers, discover models, choose defaults, and pin quick model choices.
- [Row-Bot Interface](/docs/app-shell/navigation)
  Route: /docs/app-shell/navigation. Navigate Row-Bot's sidebar, threads, Home tabs, Activity Center, Buddy, Settings, and terminal.
- [Chat](/docs/chat/)
  Route: /docs/chat/. Use Row-Bot chat, composer controls, model choices, attachments, tools, approvals, and history.
- [Model Picker](/docs/chat/model-picker)
  Route: /docs/chat/model-picker. Choose, pin, and troubleshoot Row-Bot models across local, hosted, subscription, and custom providers.
- [Tools, Approvals, And Terminal](/docs/chat/tools-approvals-and-terminal)
  Route: /docs/chat/tools-approvals-and-terminal. Understand Row-Bot tools, approval prompts, tool results, and terminal output.
- [Profiles, Goals, And Agents](/docs/profiles-goals-agents/)
  Route: /docs/profiles-goals-agents/. Choose reusable Agent Profiles, run bounded goals, and review delegated parent and child agents.
- [Workflows](/docs/guides/workflows)
  Route: /docs/guides/workflows. Create, run, schedule, edit, deliver, and troubleshoot Row-Bot workflows.
- [Designer Studio](/docs/designer/)
  Route: /docs/designer/. Create and iterate on design projects, pages, assets, previews, brands, and exports.
- [Developer Studio](/docs/developer/)
  Route: /docs/developer/. Use Row-Bot for folders, repositories, code chat, inspectors, commands, changes, and sandbox modes.
- [Knowledge](/docs/knowledge/)
  Route: /docs/knowledge/. Review and manage Row-Bot memory, documents, knowledge graph records, filters, details, and dream cycle activity.
- [Wiki Vault](/docs/knowledge/wiki-vault)
  Route: /docs/knowledge/wiki-vault. Generate and maintain a local Markdown vault from reviewed Row-Bot knowledge.
- [Knowledge Provenance And Repair](/docs/knowledge/provenance-repair)
  Route: /docs/knowledge/provenance-repair. Trace where knowledge came from, correct records, repair relations, and rebuild derived outputs safely.
- [Computer Use](/docs/computer-use/)
  Route: /docs/computer-use/. Set up and safely use Row-Bot's opt-in native Windows and macOS application control.
- [Monitor](/docs/monitor/)
  Route: /docs/monitor/. Inspect Row-Bot logs, journals, workflow state, channels, and background activity.
- [Android And Native Desktop](/docs/mobile-native/)
  Route: /docs/mobile-native/. Pair an Android companion, use mobile Chat and Activity, and understand native-only desktop behaviour.
- [How Row-Bot Works](/docs/concepts/)
  Route: /docs/concepts/. Understand Row-Bot's request, knowledge, agent, workflow, and extension models before configuring them.
- [How A Request Runs](/docs/concepts/request-lifecycle)
  Route: /docs/concepts/request-lifecycle. Follow a Row-Bot request through context assembly, a selected model route, tools, approvals, and local history.
- [How Memory Becomes Knowledge](/docs/concepts/memory-knowledge-and-dream-cycle)
  Route: /docs/concepts/memory-knowledge-and-dream-cycle. Understand thread history, memory, documents, the Knowledge Graph, Wiki Vault, and Dream Cycle as related but distinct layers.
- [How Profiles, Goals, And Agents Work](/docs/concepts/profiles-goals-and-agents)
  Route: /docs/concepts/profiles-goals-and-agents. Understand reusable Agent Profiles, durable goals, parent coordination, and bounded child-agent delegation.
- [How Background Workflows Run](/docs/concepts/background-workflows)
  Route: /docs/concepts/background-workflows. Understand saved workflow definitions, schedules, isolated runs, approvals, retries, and delivery semantics.
- [Extensions And Trust Boundaries](/docs/concepts/extensions-and-trust)
  Route: /docs/concepts/extensions-and-trust. Compare Row-Bot tools, Skills, Custom Tools, plugins, MCP servers, channels, and accounts by what they add and where they run.
- [Settings](/docs/settings/)
  Route: /docs/settings/. Understand every Row-Bot Settings tab and what each configuration area changes.
- [Settings: Providers](/docs/settings/providers)
  Route: /docs/settings/providers. Connect local, hosted, subscription, and custom model providers.
- [Settings: Models](/docs/settings/models)
  Route: /docs/settings/models. Choose defaults, pin Quick Choices, review model catalogs, and set Agent runtime limits.
- [Settings: Knowledge](/docs/settings/knowledge)
  Route: /docs/settings/knowledge. Configure memory, graph review, embeddings, document knowledge, and wiki export.
- [Settings: Buddy](/docs/settings/buddy)
  Route: /docs/settings/buddy. Configure Row-Bot's companion behavior, visibility, look, motion, and generated looks.
- [Settings: Voice](/docs/settings/voice)
  Route: /docs/settings/voice. Configure dictation, realtime talk, read-aloud, voice models, devices, and diagnostics.
- [Settings: System](/docs/settings/system)
  Route: /docs/settings/system. Configure local access, workspace paths, browser and Computer Use behavior, tunnels, logs, and updates.
- [Settings: Tracker](/docs/settings/tracker)
  Route: /docs/settings/tracker. Configure recurring activity, habit, symptom, and health tracking surfaces.
- [Settings: Documents](/docs/settings/documents)
  Route: /docs/settings/documents. Manage document ingestion, extraction, and vector indexing.
- [Settings: Search](/docs/settings/search)
  Route: /docs/settings/search. Configure web research, local retrieval, browser automation, and search tools.
- [Settings: Skills](/docs/settings/skills)
  Route: /docs/settings/skills. Enable, disable, pin, browse, and review Smart Skills.
- [Settings: Accounts](/docs/settings/accounts)
  Route: /docs/settings/accounts. Connect account-level integrations used by tools, setup flows, and channels.
- [Settings: Channels](/docs/settings/channels)
  Route: /docs/settings/channels. Configure Telegram, WhatsApp, Discord, Slack, SMS, delivery, and health checks.
- [Settings: Utilities](/docs/settings/utilities)
  Route: /docs/settings/utilities. Configure built-in helper tools and productivity utilities.
- [Settings: MCP](/docs/settings/mcp)
  Route: /docs/settings/mcp. Add, test, import, browse, enable, and troubleshoot external MCP servers.
- [Settings: Plugins](/docs/settings/plugins)
  Route: /docs/settings/plugins. Manage installed plugins, marketplace installs, configuration, and promoted Custom Tools.
- [Settings: Preferences](/docs/settings/preferences)
  Route: /docs/settings/preferences. Customize assistant identity, launch behavior, background intelligence, updates, and migration.
- [Extend Row-Bot](/docs/extending/)
  Route: /docs/extending/. Choose between built-in tools, Skills, Custom Tools, plugins, MCP servers, channels, and accounts.
- [Accounts And Authorisation](/docs/integrations/accounts)
  Route: /docs/integrations/accounts. Connect and disconnect external accounts while keeping scopes, tokens, and data flow understandable.
- [Channels](/docs/integrations/channels)
  Route: /docs/integrations/channels. Connect Row-Bot to messaging channels, delivery defaults, pairing, tunnels, and safe external behavior.
- [Skills Hub](/docs/skills/)
  Route: /docs/skills/. Browse, enable, pin, create, edit, and troubleshoot Row-Bot skills.
- [Plugins](/docs/integrations/plugins)
  Route: /docs/integrations/plugins. Install, enable, configure, update, remove, and troubleshoot Row-Bot plugins.
- [MCP](/docs/integrations/mcp)
  Route: /docs/integrations/mcp. Configure external MCP servers, test tool availability, and manage MCP safety.
- [Voice And Buddy](/docs/voice-and-buddy/)
  Route: /docs/voice-and-buddy/. Configure Dictate, Talk, local voice, realtime voice, read-aloud, devices, and Buddy.
- [Operations, Data, And Recovery](/docs/operations/)
  Route: /docs/operations/. Back up, restore, update, repair, and uninstall Row-Bot without losing track of local data and credentials.
- [Privacy And Safety](/docs/privacy-safety/)
  Route: /docs/privacy-safety/. Understand local data, provider calls, credentials, approvals, channels, MCP, plugins, and sharing.
- [Troubleshooting](/docs/troubleshooting/)
  Route: /docs/troubleshooting/. Resolve setup, model, chat, workflow, Designer, Developer, Knowledge, Monitor, Settings, channel, MCP, plugin, skill, voice, and Buddy issues.
- [Reference](/docs/reference/)
  Route: /docs/reference/. Look up Row-Bot tools, providers, settings, channels, skills, MCP, plugins, data storage, and approvals.
- [Tools](/docs/reference/generated/tools)
  Route: /docs/reference/generated/tools. Generated reference for Row-Bot tools and tool guides.
- [Providers](/docs/reference/generated/providers)
  Route: /docs/reference/generated/providers. Generated reference for model providers and provider risk labels.
- [Settings](/docs/reference/generated/settings)
  Route: /docs/reference/generated/settings. Generated reference for settings tabs.
- [Settings Controls](/docs/reference/generated/settings-controls)
  Route: /docs/reference/generated/settings-controls. Generated control-level settings reference with defaults, effects, dependencies, restart notes, and security notes.
- [Home Tabs](/docs/reference/generated/home-tabs)
  Route: /docs/reference/generated/home-tabs. Generated reference for Home tab coverage.
- [Channels](/docs/reference/generated/channels)
  Route: /docs/reference/generated/channels. Generated reference for messaging channels.
- [Skills](/docs/reference/generated/skills)
  Route: /docs/reference/generated/skills. Generated reference for bundled skills and tool guides.
- [MCP](/docs/reference/generated/mcp)
  Route: /docs/reference/generated/mcp. Generated reference for recommended MCP servers.
- [Plugins](/docs/reference/generated/plugins)
  Route: /docs/reference/generated/plugins. Generated reference for plugin manifest behavior.
- [Data Storage](/docs/reference/generated/data-storage)
  Route: /docs/reference/generated/data-storage. Generated reference for local data paths and storage.
- [Safety And Approvals](/docs/reference/generated/safety-approvals)
  Route: /docs/reference/generated/safety-approvals. Generated reference for approval policy and safety modes.
- [Environment And Config](/docs/reference/generated/environment-and-config)
  Route: /docs/reference/generated/environment-and-config. Generated reference for important environment variables.
- [CLI](/docs/reference/generated/cli)
  Route: /docs/reference/generated/cli. Generated reference for launcher and plugin command-line options.
- [Screenshots](/docs/reference/generated/screenshots)
  Route: /docs/reference/generated/screenshots. Generated reference for automated screenshot coverage.
- [Agent Profiles](/docs/app-shell/agent-profiles)
  Route: /docs/app-shell/agent-profiles. Choose and manage Agent Profiles for thread behavior, tool access, skills, and specialist work.
- [Channels And Voice Guide](/docs/guides/channels-and-voice)
  Route: /docs/guides/channels-and-voice. Compatibility page pointing to the current Channels guide.
- [Designer Studio Guide](/docs/guides/designer-studio)
  Route: /docs/guides/designer-studio. Compatibility page pointing to the current Designer Studio guide.
- [Developer Studio Guide](/docs/guides/developer-studio)
  Route: /docs/guides/developer-studio. Compatibility page pointing to the current Developer Studio guide.
- [Skills, Plugins, And MCP Guide](/docs/guides/skills-plugins-mcp)
  Route: /docs/guides/skills-plugins-mcp. Compatibility page pointing to the current Skills Hub guide.
- [Home: Designer](/docs/home/designer)
  Route: /docs/home/designer. Use the Home Designer tab as the entry point for Designer Studio projects.
- [Home: Developer](/docs/home/developer)
  Route: /docs/home/developer. Use the Home Developer tab as the entry point for code workspaces and Custom Tools.
- [Home](/docs/home/)
  Route: /docs/home/. Use Home tabs as entry points for workflows, Designer, Developer, Knowledge, and Monitor.
- [Home: Knowledge](/docs/home/knowledge)
  Route: /docs/home/knowledge. Use the Home Knowledge tab to review memories, documents, and knowledge graph activity.
- [Home: Monitor](/docs/home/monitor)
  Route: /docs/home/monitor. Use the Home Monitor tab to inspect logs, journals, channel state, and background activity.
- [Home: Workflows](/docs/home/workflows)
  Route: /docs/home/workflows. Use the Home Workflows tab as the entry point for saved automations and background agents.
- [Reference Tables](/docs/reference/generated/)
  Route: /docs/reference/generated/. Compact lookup tables for Row-Bot features and settings.
- [UI Tour](/docs/ui-tour/)
  Route: /docs/ui-tour/. A short guided tour of the Row-Bot Interface, Chat, Home, Settings, and Activity Center.
